caresync.name: CareSync AI
bullets: Architected a HIPAA-compliant medical routing coordinator using React and FastAPI.
Integrated PyTorch clinical entity resolution model to parse physician notes.
Reduced patient triage query routing times by 40% using asynchronous queue threads.
caresync.description: AI-powered clinical coordinator & routing assistant for healthcare centers.

smartedu.name: SmartEdu AI
bullets: Built predictive student success engine utilizing XGBoost with SHAP explanations.
Published and presented methodology at the ICGTETA 26 conference.
Developed interactive explanations interface tracking ML parameters metrics.
smartedu.description: XGBoost + SHAP visual educational forecasting helper and analytics portal.

applications.notes: Got reference. Screening rounds cleared. Preparing for technical phone interviews.
Received OA link. Completed 2 questions successfully.
Received Ninja role offer letters. Status verified.
Final face-to-face round completed. Waiting for confirmations.
Rejected post final round query checks.
Completed OA questions. Waiting for review.
